allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: enforce fixed node dimensions to prevent overlap and improve edge selection

Nodes now use explicit 160×44px dimensions matching the layout constants,
preventing long labels from expanding nodes and overlapping neighbors.
Edge selection applies inline bright orange style with z-index elevation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude \(claude-opus-4-6\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
bump: cluster-vision to 0.7.9

Co-Authored-By: Claude \(claude-opus-4-6\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
